risks: Single-region deployment with no cross-region disaster recovery — a regional outage would affect all services
Standard-tier resources (ACR, Redis, Service Bus) lack private networking support, exposing data plane endpoints publicly
No private endpoints configured for Cosmos DB or PostgreSQL — database traffic traverses public networks unless VNet service endpoints are enforced at deployment
Cosmos DB does not explicitly disable key-based access; RBAC-only mode is recommended per WAF security guidance
No explicit resource tagging strategy defined — impacts cost attribution, governance, and operational excellence
No Azure Firewall or egress control for AKS cluster outbound traffic — WAF security guidance recommends controlling cluster egress
No WAF/Application Gateway in front of the Istio ingress gateway for Layer 7 DDoS and bot protection
Redis Standard tier lacks persistence — cache data is lost on node failure or maintenance restart
correctionsRecommended: Add private endpoints for Cosmos DB and PostgreSQL Flexible Server to restrict database access to the VNet
Upgrade ACR to Premium SKU to enable private link and geo-replication when production-hardening
Add explicit tags (environment, service, costCenter, owner) to all resources for governance and cost tracking
Configure Azure Firewall or NSG egress rules to control AKS cluster outbound traffic per WAF security recommendations
Add Cosmos DB property 'disableLocalAuth: true' to enforce Entra ID / managed identity authentication only
Add managed identity dependency to Cosmos DB and PostgreSQL resources for passwordless authentication alignment with stated architecture principles
Consider upgrading Redis to Premium tier for VNet injection and data persistence, or add AOF/RDB persistence plan
Consider adding a geo-replication strategy for Cosmos DB and PostgreSQL read replicas as the workload scales
Add Microsoft Defender for Containers configuration to the AKS cluster for runtime threat detection
Consider adding an Application Gateway with WAF v2 in front of the Istio external ingress gateway for production traffic protection
